name: Nectarine Ginger Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Fresh ginger, peeled and minced
8 lbs Nectarines (about 24 medium), pitted and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the ginger with water in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Turn down the heat and simmer until tender, about 35-40 minutes.
2. In a large non-aluminum pot, mix the ginger water, minced ginger, sugar, vinegar, and mashed garlic. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the cubed nectarines, chopped onions, lemon juice, golden raisins, and regular raisins. Cook until thick, about 1 1/2 hours.
